options.name: --output
options.description: Specify the name of the markdown output file.

options.name: --format
options.description:
Specify the markdown file format. Valid values:
github,bitbucket,azure.

options.name: --all-recursive
options.description: Step into all referenced assemblies recursively.

options.name: --recursive
options.description:
Step into specified referenced assemblies
recursively.
Specify one or more assembly names separated by
spaces.

options.name: --include
options.description:
The list of space-separated filters of things to
include in documentation.
Filter by access: subject.visibility
Subject is one of: [all, type, method, field,
property]
Visibility is one of: [all, public, protected,
private]
Example: all.public

options.name: --exclude
options.description:
The list of space-separated filters of things to exclude from documentation.
Syntax is the same as for include filters

options.name: --ignore-attribute
options.description:
[Deprecated] Do not generate documentation for properties with specified custom attribute(s).
For example JsonIgnoreAttribute
More than one space-separate attribute can be specified.

options.name: --ignore-methods
options.description:
[Deprecated] Do not generate documentation for methods and constructors.
Useful for POCO documentation.

options.name: --method-details
options.description:
Generate detailed documentation for methods and constructors.
Setting has no effect if --ignore-methods is specified.

options.name: --msdn
options.description:
Generate links to the specified version of MSDN documentation for System.* and Microsoft.* types.
The documentation pages are located at this site https://docs.microsoft.com
Possible versions can be latest, netcore-3.1, or net-5.0

options.name: --no-title
options.description: Do not write the "created by mddox at date" in the markdown file.

options.name: --title
options.description:
Document title string format. Use {assembly} and {version} in the format string to
insert the name of the assembly and assembly version.

options.name: --type
options.description: Document only the specified type and all types referenced by it.

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Print some debug info when generating documentation.

arguments.name: assembly
arguments.description: The name of the assembly to document.
